mode: agent
---
# Migrate System

## Description
Plan and execute system migration with comprehensive risk mitigation and validation procedures.

## Usage
Use this prompt to migrate applications, databases, or entire systems to new platforms or technologies.

## Prompt
MIGRATE SYSTEM: [source] to [target] for [project-name]

Plan and execute system migration with risk mitigation.

## Context
This prompt activates:
- Launcher/Architect for migration strategy and planning
- Senior Developer for implementation and data migration
- DevOps for infrastructure transition and automation
- Comprehensive testing and validation procedures
- Risk assessment and rollback capabilities

## Examples
```
MIGRATE SYSTEM: legacy PHP app to Next.js for TaskMaster
```

```
MIGRATE SYSTEM: MySQL database to PostgreSQL for EcommerceHub
```

```
MIGRATE SYSTEM: on-premise infrastructure to AWS cloud for EnterpriseApp
```

## References
- #file:.github/instructions/launcher.instructions.md
- #file:.github/instructions/senior-developer-agent.instructions.md
- #file:.github/instructions/devops-engineer-agent.instructions.md

## Expected Output
- Migration strategy and timeline
- Data migration procedures with validation
- Infrastructure transition plan
- Testing and validation procedures
- Risk assessment and rollback plan
- Performance comparison and optimization
- Documentation and training materials
